📚 Optimization Tips

  • ✓ Add indexes on frequently filtered columns
  • ✓ Avoid SELECT * when possible
  • ✓ Use JOINs instead of subqueries
  • ✓ Consider window functions for aggregations
  • ✓ Analyze EXPLAIN plans

ℹ️ About

SQL Query Optimizer uses Groq AI to analyze and improve your queries.

✨ Completely FREE - 9,000 requests/day

Supports: PostgreSQL, MySQL, BigQuery
